projectDescription: Kinoko is an open-source server emulator for MapleStory v95 (GMS/BMS locale 8), written in Java using Netty, supporting SQLite and Cassandra/ScyllaDB backends and full Docker deployment.
keyFeatures: MapleStory v95 (GMS locale 8) protocol emulation via Netty
Multi-node architecture: Login, Central, and Channel server nodes
Dual database support: SQLite (default, zero-config) and Cassandra/ScyllaDB
Full job support: Explorers, Cygnus Knights, Aran, Evan, and Resistance classes
WZ file-based data loading for items, maps, mobs, NPCs, quests, skills, and reactors
Cash Shop with configurable commodity and modified item YAML files
In-game admin command system with prefix-based dispatch
Docker Compose support for both SQLite and Cassandra deployments
Configurable world settings: channel count, slot limits, secondary password, debug mode
publicApiSurface: kinoko.server.Server#main — entry point, initializes all providers and server nodes
kinoko.server.ServerConstants — CENTRAL_HOST, CENTRAL_PORT, SERVER_HOST, LOGIN_PORT, CHANNEL_PORT, DATABASE_PROVIDER
kinoko.server.ServerConfig — WORLD_ID, WORLD_NAME, CHANNELS_PER_WORLD, AUTO_CREATE_ACCOUNT, REQUIRE_SECONDARY_PASSWORD, WZ_DIRECTORY, DATA_DIRECTORY, COMMAND_PREFIX, DEBUG_MODE
kinoko.server.node.LoginServerNode — handles client login flow on port 8484
kinoko.server.node.ChannelServerNode — handles in-game channel sessions on ports 8585–8989
kinoko.server.node.CentralServerNode — inter-node coordination hub on port 8282
kinoko.script.common.ScriptDispatcher — NPC, portal, quest, and event script execution engine
kinoko.database.DatabaseManager — initializes and manages SQLite or Cassandra connections
kinoko.provider.* — data providers: ItemProvider, MapProvider, MobProvider, NpcProvider, QuestProvider, SkillProvider, RewardProvider, ShopProvider
data/reward/<mobId or map>.yaml — mob/map drop reward definitions
data/cash/modified.yaml — modified Cash Shop commodity overrides
